---
title: "CN334 Data Analytics"
author: "Aakriti Sharma"
date: "2026-03-23"
output:
  pdf_document: default
  html_document: default
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## Exercise 3

##Read the help file

```{r}
help(read.table)


# read.csv
# Comma Delimited
Iris <- read.csv("C:/Users/Student/Documents/r/iris_data.csv")

# Display first 2 rows
Iris[1:2, ]
```

## Reading data from website

```{r}
myURL <- "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mwaskom/seaborn-data/master/iris.csv"
read.csv(myURL)[1:2, ]
```
